HIST648 Readings in Early 20th-Century America, 1900-1941 (3 Credits) Major historical literature on various groups and developments in the United States between the Progressive Era and the beginning of World War Il.

HIST649 Readings in Recent American History, 1941-Present (3 Credits) Key subjects, themes, and historiographic debates in the history of the United States from 1941 to the present.
